name: design-mode
description: Open-source visual design surface in the browser with MCP integration for coding agents
author: Sandeep Baskaran

scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:website
scripts.package:extension: npm run build:extension && cd packages/extension/dist && rm -f ../design-mode-extension.zip && zip -rq ../design-mode-extension.zip . -x '*.DS_Store' -x '*.map'
scripts.test:e2e: echo '➜  Walk through docs/e2e-testcases.md against the freshly-built dist/. Every phase has to pass before publish.'
